title: Alteration of appraisal reports
doc_html:
§3415.17.  Alteration of appraisal reports

An appraisal management company shall not alter, modify, or otherwise change a completed real estate appraisal service report submitted by an appraiser.

Acts 2009, No. 502, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2010.
